rationale.D1: No *IO interfaces exist in this season repo; subsystems (Shooter, ShooterHood, Intake) directly own TalonFX/SparkMax hardware; the houndutil BaseShooter/BaseSwerveDrive interfaces provide swerve-level abstraction but are not the per-subsystem IO-layer pattern — no sim-impl or hardware-impl swap point for mechanisms.
rationale.D2: Superstructure exists and aggregates subsystem references with command-factory methods (targetHubEasyCommand, passCommand, targetHubSotmCommand), but there is no goal-request API, no WantedState/SystemState enum, and no guarded transition logic — it is a command holder at the D2 boundary rather than a true D3 coordinator.
rationale.D3: FlywheelSim wired into Shooter.simulationPeriodic, SingleJointedArmSim in ShooterHood and Intake, VisionSystemSim in Vision — multiple mechanism physics models confirmed used; no maple-sim or full drivetrain dynamics sim beyond Pigeon2 yaw integration.
rationale.D4: No src/test directory found anywhere in the 2026 repo; no test files, no @Test annotations, no CI step running tests (CI workflow only runs `./gradlew build`).
rationale.D5: Team's own houndutil houndlog framework with @LoggedObject/@Log/@Tunable annotations confirmed across 9+ subsystem files plus LoggingManager.registerObject and DataLogManager wiring in RobotContainer — structured systematic logging, not AdvantageKit processInputs but clearly beyond SmartDashboard scatter.
rationale.D6: PathPlannerLib actively wired: followPathCommand and driveDeltaCommand use FollowPathCommand with PPHolonomicDriveController; driveToPoseCommand implemented; Choreo .traj/.chor files exist in deploy/choreo but zero Choreo API references found in Java source — discounted.
rationale.D7: Two AprilTagPhotonCamera instances, addVisionMeasurement and addPreciseVisionMeasurement called with per-camera std-dev tuning (SINGLE_TAG_STD_DEVS, MULTI_TAG_STD_DEVS, MULTI_TAG_TELEOP_STD_DEVS), speed-based rejection (normSpeed < 0.8 check), and dual SwerveDrivePoseEstimator fused — confirmed D7=3; no TimeInterpolatableBuffer or dedicated RobotState class.
rationale.D8: CI workflows confirmed in 2022-2025 season repos (GitHub Actions `./gradlew build`); houndutil consumed as a subproject (implementation project(':houndutil') in build.gradle) and maintained across 5+ seasons; README is a single-line stub — no contributing docs or formatter configured, but library-plus-CI pattern warrants D8=3.
